message:
feat(config): refactor InterfaceModeResolver for testability and add comprehensive mode precedence tests (br-1i11.5.1)

- Extract resolve_with_env() and validate_with_env() internal helpers to enable
  unit testing of mode resolution without relying on actual environment variables
- Public resolve()/validate() methods continue to call env::var() internally,
  preserving the existing API surface
- Add 60+ tests covering:
  - Mode resolution precedence: explicit override > env var > binary default
  - Validation warnings for env var conflicts with binary identity
  - Display formatting for all interface modes
  - Edge cases: empty strings, invalid values, case sensitivity
- Strengthen enforcement of ADR-001 Invariant 3 (binary identity wins but
  env var conflicts produce diagnostic warnings)
- Update bootstrap_summary_format test naming for precision

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
